title: Xylophonic Indian Candy Pilaf
description: A sweet and fluffy pilaf dish featuring vermicelli rice noodles, candied citrus, and warm spices.
instructions: Bring 2 cups of water to a boil in a large saucepan.
Add vermicelli rice noodles to the boiling water and cook according to package instructions.
Drain the noodles and set them aside.
In a large skillet, heat the ghee over medium heat.
Add the cardamom and cinnamon to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the candied orange and lemon peel to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss to combine with the spices and citrus.
Stir in the rosewater and sugar until well combined.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the noodles are well coated with the spice and citrus mixture.
Serve hot, garnished with additional candied citrus peel if desired.
